pick.description: Intraday screener agent — scans entire Nifty 50 for high-value stocks, applies 8-point screener, writes rich HTML at analysis/<date>/<counter>.html
Run the intraday screener: scan full Nifty 50 for high-value (anti-manipulation) stocks, apply 8-point screener, pick the best, write HTML output at analysis/<date>/<counter>.html.
pick.template: Run the intraday screener workflow — scan the entire Nifty 50 for high-value stocks (prefer price > ₹500 to avoid manipulation), apply 8 criteria, pick the best stock, and write the HTML output at analysis/<date>/<counter>.html.
